name: Sony PlayStation 5 Console
description: Experience lightning-fast loading with an ultra-high-speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and 3D Audio. The PS5 console unleashes new gaming possibilities you never anticipated.
features: Ultra-high-speed SSD for near-instant load times
Ray tracing support for realistic lighting and reflections
4K-TV gaming at up to 120fps
Haptic feedback and adaptive triggers on DualSense controller
Backwards compatible with PS4 games

name: Microsoft Xbox Series X Console
description: The fastest, most powerful Xbox ever. Play thousands of titles from four generations of consoles with Xbox Game Pass Ultimate. Enjoy 12 teraflops of raw graphic processing power and true 4K gaming.
features: 12 teraflops of processing power
True 4K gaming at up to 120fps
1TB Custom NVMe SSD for fast load times
Xbox Velocity Architecture for seamless gameplay
Smart Delivery ensures best version of games

name: Nintendo Switch OLED Model
description: The Nintendo Switch OLED Model features a vibrant 7-inch OLED screen, a wide adjustable stand, and enhanced audio. Play at home on your TV or on the go with this versatile hybrid console.
features: Vibrant 7-inch OLED screen with rich colors
Wide adjustable stand for tabletop mode
Enhanced audio speakers for handheld and tabletop play
64GB internal storage (expandable via microSD)
Wired LAN port on the dock for stable online play

name: Microsoft Xbox Series S Console
description: Go all-digital with the Xbox Series S and enjoy next-gen performance in the smallest Xbox ever. Target 1440p gaming at up to 120fps and enjoy the speed of a custom 512GB SSD.
features: Smallest Xbox console ever made
Up to 120fps at 1440p resolution
512GB Custom NVMe SSD
Xbox Velocity Architecture
All-digital with no disc drive

name: Razer Blade 16 Gaming Laptop
description: The Razer Blade 16 delivers uncompromising gaming performance in a sleek CNC aluminum chassis. Featuring an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 and a stunning 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display for the ultimate portable gaming experience.
features: 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display with 100% DCI-P3
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Laptop GPU
Intel Core i9-13950HX processor
Per-key RGB Razer Chroma keyboard
Vapor chamber cooling system for sustained performance

name: Corsair Vengeance i7400 Gaming PC
description: The Corsair Vengeance i7400 is a fully built gaming desktop powered by an Intel Core i7 and NVIDIA RTX 4070 Ti. It comes pre-built and ready to game right out of the box with Corsair's premium components throughout.
features: Intel Core i7-13700KF processor
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti GPU
Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB RAM
Corsair iCUE RGB lighting and software control
Corsair RM850e 80+ Gold power supply

name: Logitech G PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2 Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: The Logitech G PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2 is the evolution of the legendary pro gaming mouse. Weighing less than 60 grams with the HERO 2 sensor delivering up to 44,000 DPI and zero smoothing or filtering.
features: Less than 60g ultra-lightweight design
HERO 2 sensor with up to 44,000 DPI
LIGHTSPEED wireless with 1ms report rate
Up to 95 hours battery life
Zero smoothing, filtering, or acceleration

name: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro Analog Optical Gaming Keyboard
description: The Razer Huntsman V3 Pro features analog optical switches with adjustable actuation for precise control. Get the competitive edge with rapid trigger mode and per-key Razer Chroma RGB backlighting.
features: Razer Analog Optical Switches with adjustable actuation
Rapid Trigger mode for instant key response
Per-key Razer Chroma RGB lighting
Magnetic plush leatherette wrist rest
Multi-function digital dial and media keys

name: Corsair K100 RGB Optical-Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: The Corsair K100 RGB is the pinnacle of Corsair keyboards with OPX optical-mechanical switches and an iCUE control wheel. Featuring 44-zone LightEdge RGB, axial hyper-processing technology, and 4,000Hz polling rate.
features: Corsair OPX optical-mechanical switches
iCUE control wheel for custom macro commands
Per-key and 44-zone LightEdge RGB
4,000Hz hyper-polling for ultra-fast input
Detachable magnetic palm rest

name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless Gaming Headset
description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless is the ultimate premium gaming headset featuring active noise cancellation, hot-swappable dual batteries, and high-fidelity audio drivers. Connects to PC, PlayStation, Switch, and mobile simultaneously.
features: Active Noise Cancellation with transparency mode
Hot-swappable dual-battery system for infinite use
High Fidelity custom neodymium drivers
Simultaneous 2.4GHz wireless and Bluetooth connection
Nova Pro Base Station with OLED display and DAC

name: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro Wireless Gaming Headset (2023)
description: The Razer BlackShark V2 Pro 2023 edition delivers esports-grade audio with Razer TriForce Titanium 50mm drivers and HyperClear Super Wideband Mic. Ultralight at just 320g with memory foam ear cushions for marathon sessions.
features: Razer TriForce Titanium 50mm drivers
HyperClear Super Wideband Mic
THX Spatial Audio for immersive sound
Ultra-lightweight 320g design
Memory foam ear cushions with breathable fabric

name: Sony DualSense Edge Wireless Controller
description: The DualSense Edge is Sony's ultra-customizable pro controller for PlayStation 5. Remap buttons, adjust stick sensitivity and dead zones, and swap between multiple control profiles on the fly with back buttons and swappable stick caps.
features: Fully remappable buttons and back paddles
Adjustable trigger lengths and dead zones
Swappable stick caps and back button modules
Multiple on-controller profiles with quick switch
Built-in Fn button for on-the-fly adjustments

specs.Included: Carrying case, braided USB-C cable, 2 standard caps, 2 high dome caps, 2 low dome caps, 2 half dome back buttons, 2 lever back buttons

name: SteelSeries Rival 650 Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: The SteelSeries Rival 650 features a TrueMove3+ dual sensor system and custom center of gravity tuning with a 256-weight configuration system. Enjoy lag-free wireless gaming with 24-hour battery and rapid charging.
features: TrueMove3+ dual optical sensor system
Custom center of gravity with 256 weight configurations
Quantum Wireless lag-free technology
15 min charge = 10+ hours of gameplay
Silicone side grips for secure handling

name: Corsair VOID RGB Elite Wireless Gaming Headset
description: The Corsair VOID RGB Elite Wireless delivers exceptional comfort and audio quality with custom-tuned 50mm neodymium drivers and 7.1 surround sound. Enjoy up to 16 hours of battery life and premium microfiber mesh ear pads.
features: Custom-tuned 50mm neodymium audio drivers
7.1 surround sound on PC via Corsair iCUE
Omnidirectional microphone with LED mute indicator
Up to 16 hours of battery life
Premium microfiber mesh fabric and memory foam ear pads

name: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom - Nintendo Switch
description: An epic adventure across the land and skies of Hyrule awaits in The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom. Explore the vast land and skies above, and the mysterious new depths below using abilities like Ultrahand, Fuse, Ascend, and Recall.
features: Massive open world with new sky islands to explore
New abilities including Ultrahand, Fuse, Ascend, and Recall
Build vehicles, weapons, and contraptions with Zonai Devices
Explore vast underground depths beneath Hyrule
Sequel to the critically acclaimed Breath of the Wild

name: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 - PlayStation 5
description: Spider-Men Peter Parker and Miles Morales return for an exciting new adventure in Marvel's Spider-Man 2 for PS5. Swing, jump, and utilize new web abilities across Marvel's expansive New York in this epic sequel.
features: Play as both Peter Parker and Miles Morales
Expansive Marvel's New York with new boroughs
New symbiote abilities and web wings for traversal
Near-instant fast travel powered by PS5 SSD
Stunning ray-traced visuals at 60fps in Performance mode

name: Starfield - Xbox Series X|S
description: Starfield is Bethesda Game Studios' first new universe in over 25 years. Create any character you want and explore over 1,000 planets with unparalleled freedom in this next-generation space RPG.
features: Explore over 1,000 planets across the Settled Systems
Deep character customization and backgrounds
Build and customize your own spaceship
Join factions and shape the story your way
Modular weapon and equipment crafting system

name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder - Nintendo Switch
description: Super Mario Bros. Wonder brings a new sense of wonder to the classic 2D Mario side-scrolling formula. Touch a Wonder Flower to trigger spectacular transformations and surprises across the Flower Kingdom.
features: Brand new 2D Mario adventure with expressive animations
Wonder Flowers trigger wild level transformations
Play as Mario, Luigi, Peach, Daisy, Toad, and more
Up to 4-player local multiplayer
Dozens of unique courses across the Flower Kingdom

name: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III - PlayStation 5
description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III brings back the legendary Captain Price and Task Force 141. Features a thrilling campaign, the largest multiplayer launch with 16 remastered maps, and the all-new open-world Zombies mode.
features: Cinematic single-player campaign with open combat missions
Largest multiplayer launch map selection in COD history
All-new open-world Zombies experience
Carry forward all content from Modern Warfare II
Cross-play and cross-progression across platforms

name: Forza Motorsport - Xbox Series X|S
description: Forza Motorsport delivers the most technically advanced racing game ever made. Experience stunning ray-traced environments, a dynamic weather system, and over 500 cars with unparalleled physics simulation on Xbox Series X|S.
features: Over 500 meticulously detailed cars at launch
Ray-traced visuals with dynamic time of day and weather
Completely rebuilt physics engine for realistic handling
Career mode with car and driver progression
Competitive multiplayer with skill-based matchmaking
